attributes.Sql Query:
/*Insert data from WI Table to attribution measure table for Bundle PID for which 
we have Bundle available in PID Split Table*/ 

SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
RP.ITEM_KEY   BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT*NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100      CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME          	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_BNDL_QRTR_CURR_MNTH WCMB
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
ON(WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
ON (RP. ITEM_KEY= NHBPS.PRODUCT_KEY)
WHERE NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
RP.ITEM_KEY   BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT*NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100      CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME            	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_BNDL_QRTR_PRV_MNTH WCMB
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT  NHBPS
ON(WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
ON (RP. ITEM_KEY= NHBPS.PRODUCT_KEY)
WHERE NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'

/* Insert data from WI Table to attribution measure table for Bundle PID for which 
we dont have Bundle available in Split Table */

SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT    	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME          	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_BNDL_QRTR_CURR_MNTH WCMB
WHERE WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME NOT IN 
(SELECT NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS
WHERE NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
WHERE NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
)

UNION ALL 

SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT    	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME          	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_BNDL_QRTR_PRV_MNTH WCMB
WHERE WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME NOT IN 
(SELECT NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT  NHBFS
WHERE NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
WHERE NHBPS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
)

/*Insert data from WI Table to attribution measure table for Bundle PID for which 
we have Bundle available in  pf Split Table*/ 

SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
RP.ITEM_KEY   BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT*NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100      CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY ,
WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME           	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_BNDL_QRTR_CURR_MNTH WCMB
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS
ON(WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
ON RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TRIM(NHBFS.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID)||'_ADJ_PROD'
WHERE NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'

UNION ALL


SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
RP.ITEM_KEY   BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT*NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100      CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY   ,
WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME         	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_BNDL_QRTR_PRV_MNTH WCMB
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS
ON(WCMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
ON RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TRIM(NHBFS.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID)||'_ADJ_PROD'
WHERE NHBFS.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'

/*Insert data from WI Table to Measure Table for NON Bundle PID*/ 

SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT    	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'N' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY   ,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME         	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_NONBNDL_QRT_CUR_MNT WCMB

UNION ALL
SELECT 
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_COST_ACTL_LN_KEY   	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
WCMB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
WCMB.BK_PRODUCT_KEY             	,
WCMB.CNTRB_MRGN_ACTL_LN_USD_AMT    	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_CREATE_DTM           	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER       	,
WCMB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM           	,
'N' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                	,
BK_PRODUCT_KEY BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY     ,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME       	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_CNTRB_NONBNDL_QRT_PRV_MNT WCMB
